title: Add podman artifact ls --format '{{ .VirtualSize }}'
body:
### Feature request description

A clear and concise description of what the feature request is about.

Podman artifact ls only returns human readable size, it would be easier for applications that use the command to just use the integer size.

### Suggest potential solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

Above is clear.

### Have you considered any alternatives?

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

Yes I will have to hack out translating from HumanSize back to Virtual Size to be able to use the numbers for a total size of AI Models installed on my system.

### Additional context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

RamaLama would benefit from this feature.
